level_signals: Directly interfaces with executive leadership on program health and strategy
Accountable for Sierra's most critical security programs end-to-end
Partners with security and engineering leadership to define priorities and investment areas

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience running security-focused technical programs in fast-growing SaaS or platform environments.
Strong technical fluency across cloud infrastructure, IAM, infrastructure as code, observability, secure CI/CD, and incident response.
Ability to execute through ambiguity, prioritize effectively, and keep teams moving.
Comfort operating in environments where things aren't fully built yet and helping decide what needs to be built first.
Clear, concise communication with senior technical and business leaders.
A collaborative, pragmatic style with high ownership and high agency.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience scaling security programs globally in AI-first or data-intensive SaaS environments.
Exposure to emerging AI risk, data governance, or agent and model-related security considerations.
Experience supporting security initiatives in public-sector, regulated and/or multi-cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Azure).
Relevant security, cloud, AI or technical program management certifications.
Familiarity with regulatory and compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, PCI DSS, FedRAMP, HIPAA)

scope.surface: Security and infrastructure programs spanning cloud infrastructure, platform security, IAM, detection and response, vulnerability management, and secure software delivery
primary_metrics_inferred: Security program delivery against clear milestones and outcomes
Incident readiness and detection baseline coverage
core_responsibilities: Drive high-impact security and infrastructure initiatives end-to-end
Own execution, planning, and program health for Sierra's most critical security programs
Partner with security and engineering leadership to define priorities, investment areas, and execution plans
Build and strengthen security foundations (identity boundaries, access controls, logging and detection baselines, incident readiness, secure defaults)
Translate ambiguity into clear execution across security, risk, and compliance challenges
Lead communication and alignment with leadership on program health, risks, dependencies, and tradeoffs

compensation.equity_form: equity plans subject to applicable plans and policies
